image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if your fever is your body’s secret weapon?
Context visual: Fever isn’t just discomfort; it’s a natural response to infection.
Escalation visual: When your body heats up, it’s fighting back—activating immune cells and slowing down pathogens.
Evidence visual: Studies show that a higher body temperature can enhance your immune response. But beware! Not all fevers are helpful.
Payoff visual: Fever can be a double-edged sword—it's crucial to monitor its intensity.
Cta visual: Want to learn more about your body’s defense mechanisms? Hit like and follow!
